title: cupressus lusitanica subsp. torulosa
intro: Cupressus lusitanica subsp. torulosa, also known as the African cedar or Atlas cedar, is a subspecies of coniferous tree native to the Atlas Mountains in North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cupressus lusitanica subsp. torulosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
